rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.074, which governs annual auditing of the department's books and accounts. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 2306.074. AUDIT. (a) The department's books and accounts must be audited each fiscal year by a certified public accountant
_note: Rule text concerns departmental audit procedures; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
